Sender: P. Lacau, Director General of the Antiquities Service
Recipient: Monsieur E. Baraize, Director of Works for the Antiquities Service, at Abydos
Brief_Summary: The Director General of the Antiquities Service, P. Lacau, sends five copies of the Abydos temple plan to Monsieur E. Baraize, Director of Works, as previously requested in a letter dated November 27th.
English_Translation:
SUBJECT.- Law on the...
(MODEL N° 37 — Form No. 37)

ANTIQUITIES SERVICE.

GENERAL DIRECTORATE.

N° 5.2/2

Attachments 6

Cairo, December 9, 1922

SUBJECT.- Temple of Abydos.

Sir,

I have the honor to send you herewith, along with the original, the five copies of the plan of the temple of Abydos that you requested in your letter of November 27th instant, N°203.

Please accept, Sir, the assurance of my distinguished consideration.

THE DIRECTOR GENERAL,

P. Lacau (handwritten signature)

[Stamp: ANTIQUITIES DEPARTMENT]
[Stamp: CAIRO 3.DE.22. 2:15]
Monsieur E. Baraize,
Director of Works
for the Antiquities Service,
at Abydos

Balianch (handwritten note)
Badawi (handwritten note)

[Stamp: ANTIQUITIES SERVICE GENERAL DIRECTORATE]
[Stamp: (132 D.) EGYPTIAN GOVT (Egyptian Government) with handwritten Arabic: حكومة مصرية]
Stamps_and_Annotations: Stamp: SERVICE DES ANTIQUITES DIRECTION GENERALE (Antiquities Service General Directorate)
Stamp: (132 D.) EGYP GOVT (Egyptian Government) with handwritten Arabic: حكومة مصرية
Confidence_Notes: The initial 'OBJET.- Loi sur les pe' is an incomplete phrase, likely a general file subject. The handwritten names 'Balianch' and 'Badawi' appear to be internal processing notes or initials, their specific roles are not detailed in the document.
Full_Transcription:
OBJET.- Loi sur les pe

(MODÈLE N° 37 — [Handwritten Arabic: أورنيك نمرة ٣٧])

SERVICE DES ANTIQUITÉS.

DIRECTION GÉNÉRALE.

N° 5.2/2

Pièces jointes 6

Le Caire, le [Pencil note: 9] Déc. 1922

OBJET.- Temple d' Abydos.

Monsieur,

J'ai l'honneur de vous faire parvenir ci-
joint, avec l'original, les cinq copies du plan du temple
d'Abydos que vous nous avez demandées suivant votre lettre
du 27 Novembre courant, N°203.

Veuillez agréer, Monsieur, l'assurance de ma
considération distinguée.

LE DIRECTEUR GENERAL,

[Handwritten: Placan]

[Stamp: ANTIQUITIES DEPARTMENT]
[Stamp: CAIRO 3.DE.22. 2:15]
Monsieur E. Baraize,
Directeur de Travaux
du Sce des Antiquités,
à Abydos

[Handwritten: Balianch]
[Handwritten: Badawi]

[Stamp: SERVICE DES ANTIQUITES DIRECTION GENERALE]
[Stamp: (132 D.) EGYP GOVT [Handwritten Arabic: حكومة مصرية]]
